basic_details.job_title: Mithila Painting Institute Madhubani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Administrative Officer, Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mithila Painting Institute Madhubani Acharya, Administrative Officer, Accountant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Mithila Painting Institute Madhubani Acharya, Administrative Officer, Accountant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 62 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: National/State Award in Madhubani Painting, Graduate Degree, B.Com, Administrative Experience (5 years), Accounting Experience (3 years), Art Diploma/Degree/Experience (preferred)
qualification.details: Acharya: National or State award in Madhubani painting. Administrative Officer: Graduate degree in any subject and 5 years administrative experience in any institute. Preference for diploma/degree or experience in art field. Accountant: B.Com degree and 3 years experience in any institute. Preference for diploma/degree or experience in art field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Mithila Painting Institute Madhubani Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mithila Painting Institute Madhubani recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the Mithila Painting Institute Madhubani recruitment is 30-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of Acharya, Administrative Officer, and Accountant in the Mithila Painting Institute Madhubani recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Acharya post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Acharya post, candidates must possess a National or State award in Madhubani painting. This is a specialized qualification for the role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the posts is between a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 62 years. Specific age relaxations are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for these posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 40,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available data.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Achievement Evaluation, followed by an Interview, and then Counseling for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P.R. 022745 (Youth, Art & Culture) 2025-26.

faq.question: Q10. Which state and city is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the Mithila Painting Institute Madhubani, located in Madhubani city, Bihar state.
